/usr/lib/ccache/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/dumme_msgs/libdumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/dumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/dumme_msgs/srv/_euler_to_quaternion_s.c.o CMakeFiles/dumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/dumme_msgs/srv/_quaternion_to_euler_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/asambhav/Storage/dumme_sim/build/dumme_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libdumme_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libdumme_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
